
# SDM
BIOMOD: https://biomodhub.github.io/biomod2/articles/examples_1_mainFunctions.html
```{r}
library(countrycode)
library(CoordinateCleaner)
library(rgbif)
library(sp)
library(here)
library(raster)
library(dismo)
library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)
library(biomod2)
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(ggpubr)
# devtools::install_github('adamlilith/enmSdm', dependencies=TRUE)
library(enmSdm)
library(RStoolbox)
source(here("analysis", "sdm", "bias.R"))
source(here("analysis", "sdm", "sdm.R"))
source(here("analysis", "sdm", "get_coords.R"))
source(here("analysis", "sdm", "paleovars.R"))
source(here("general_functions.R"))

# set maxent path
# put maxent.jar in your working directory (what you get when you run getwd()) or set manually: https://rdrr.io/cran/biomod2/man/BIOMOD_ModelingOptions.html
Sys.setenv(JAVA_HOME='/usr/lib/jvm/java-11-openjdk-amd64')

```
```{r}
# get paleoclim data
env_list <- get_paleovars()
env_list_agg <- map(env_list, ~aggregate(.x, 2))
cur <- env_list[["cur"]]
lig <- env_list[["lig"]]

# get current env data
env_data <- rast(here("data", "env", "california_env_stack.tif"))
```

```{r}
# get coordinates
occ_coords <- get_occ_coords("Sceloporus occidentalis", data_source = "both", occ_limit = 10000, cache = TRUE)

# get or create bias background layer
bias_class <- get_bias("Sceloporus occidentalis", rank = "class", limit = 10000, n = 10000, cache = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# select uncorrelated variables
bioclim_selected_vars <- pc_var_selection(cur)
bioclim <- cur[[bioclim_selected_vars]]

# run SDM
sdm_bioclim <- 
  sdm(
    coordinates = occ_coords,
    envlayers = bioclim, 
    biasdat = bias_class, 
    models = "RF", 
    BIOMOD_name = "BIOMOD_CLIM", 
    tune = FALSE
    )

# Write out raster
bioclim_raster <- sdm_bioclim$raster
writeRaster(bioclim_raster, here("analysis", "sdm", "outputs", "sdm_bioclim.tif"), overwrite = TRUE)
bioclim_raster <- rast(here("analysis", "sdm", "outputs", "sdm_bioclim.tif"))
plot(bioclim_raster, col = viridis::mako(100), axes = FALSE, box = FALSE)

# Convert to binary layer
cutoff <- 
  sdm_bioclim$eval %>% 
  filter(metric.eval == "TSS") %>% 
  pull(cutoff) 
  
bin_raster <- bioclim_raster
bin_raster[bin_raster > cutoff/1000] <- 1
bin_raster[bin_raster <= cutoff/1000] <- 0
plot(bin_raster)

# Hindcast SDMs
hindcast_sdms <- 
  map(
    env_list[c("lig", "lgm", "lh", "cur")],
   ~hindcast(sdm_bioclim$myBiomodModelOut, new_env = .x[[selected_vars]])
   )
hindcast_sdms <- rast(hindcast_sdms)
writeRaster(hindcast_sdms, here("analysis", "sdm", "outputs", "hindcast_bioclim_sdms.tif"), overwrite = TRUE)
hindcast_sdms <- rast(here("analysis", "sdm", "outputs", "hindcast_bioclim_sdms.tif"))

# calculate change and stability
cur_sdm <- bioclim_raster
dif_lh_sdm <- cur_sdm - hindcast_sdms[["lh"]]
dif_lgm_sdm <- cur_sdm - hindcast_sdms[["lgm"]]
dif_lig_sdm <- cur_sdm - hindcast_sdms[["lig"]]

hindcast_subset <- subset(hindcast_sdms, c("lig", "lgm", "lh", "cur"))
stability <- app(hindcast_subset, mean, na.rm =TRUE)
variability <- app(hindcast_subset, sd, na.rm =TRUE)

par(mfrow = c(1, 5))
plot(stability, col = mako(100))
plot(variability, col = mako(100))
plot(dif_lh_sdm, col = viridis(100))
plot(dif_lgm_sdm, col = viridis(100))
plot(dif_lig_sdm, col = viridis(100))
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

trend <- global(hindcast_subset, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
trend <- data.frame(mean = trend, tp = rownames(trend)) %>% mutate(tp = factor(tp, levels = names(hindcast_subset)))
ggplot(trend) + geom_line(aes(x = tp, y = mean, group = 1))

# compare to genetic diversity
source("analysis/genetic_diversity/genetic_diversity.R")
het <- get_het()
#roh <- get_roh()
#coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% left_join(het) %>% left_join(roh)
coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% left_join(het)
lh_dif_vals <- extract(dif_lh_sdm, coords, ID = FALSE)
lgm_dif_vals <- extract(dif_lgm_sdm, coords, ID = FALSE)
lig_dif_vals <- extract(dif_lig_sdm, coords, ID = FALSE)
stability_vals <- extract(stability, coords, ID = FALSE)
cur_vals <- extract(cur_sdm, coords, ID = FALSE)

# df <- data.frame(cur = cur_vals, coords)
df <- 
  data.frame(
    lh_dif = lh_dif_vals[,1],
    lgm_dif = lgm_dif_vals[,1],
    lig_dif = lig_dif_vals[,1],
    stability = stability_vals[,1],  
    cur = cur_vals[,1], 
    Ho = coords$Ho
  )
ggdf <- df %>% pivot_longer(-Ho)

ggplot(ggdf, aes(x = value, y = Ho)) +
  geom_point() +
  stat_regline_equation(
      aes(label =  paste(after_stat(eq.label), after_stat(adj.rr.label), sep = "~~~~")),
      formula = y ~ x
    ) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  stat_cor(label.y = 0) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free") +
  theme_classic()

```

```{r}
# presentation plots
ggplot(as.data.frame(sdm_raster, xy = TRUE)) +
  geom_sf(data = ca, fill = "darkgray") +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = .data[[names(sdm_raster)[1]]])) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Suitability") +
  theme_void()

ggplot(as.data.frame(stability, xy = TRUE)) +
  geom_sf(data = ca, fill = "darkgray") +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = .data[[names(stability)[1]]])) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako", limits =c(0,1)) +
  labs(fill = "Stability") +
  theme_void()
```

```{r}
# is stability correlated with change in bio1
dif_bio1 <- env_list[["cur"]][["bio_1"]] -  env_list[["lig"]][["bio_1"]]
dif_vals <- extract(dif_bio1, coords, ID = FALSE)
df$change_bio1 <- dif_vals[,1]

# check correlations with Ho
cor(df$change_bio1, df$Ho, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
cor(df$stability, df$Ho, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

# correlated, but not strongly
cor(df$change_bio1, df$stability, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

# check for statistical suppression/whether both variables are significant when both are included
mod1 <- lm(Ho ~ change_bio1, data = df)
summary(mod1)
mod2 <- lm(Ho ~ stability, data = df)
summary(mod2)
mod3 <- lm(Ho ~ stability + change_bio1, data = df)
summary(mod3)
# stability is no longer significant when bio1 is included (but it is close...)
```

```{r}
# is sdm current value correlated with change in bio1
df <- coords
dif_bio1 <-env_list[["cur"]][["bio_2"]] -  env_list[["lh"]][["bio_2"]]
df$change_bio1 <-  extract(dif_bio1, coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]
df$sdm_vals <- extract(hindcast_sdms[["cur"]], coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]

# confirm correlations with Ho
cor(df$change_bio1, df$Ho, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
cor(df$sdm_vals, df$Ho, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

# correlated, but not strongly (-0.42)
cor(df$change_bio1, df$sdm_vals, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

# check for statistical suppression/whether both variables are significant when both are included
mod1 <- lm(Ho ~ change_bio1, data = df)
summary(mod1)
mod2 <- lm(Ho ~ sdm_vals, data = df)
summary(mod2)
mod3 <- lm(Ho ~ sdm_vals + change_bio1, data = df)
summary(mod3)
# sdm value is not significant when bio1 is included or by itself
```

# SDM with all environmental data
```{r}
# select uncorrelated variables
selected_vars <- pc_var_selection(env_data)
env_data_selected <- env_data[[selected_vars]]

# remove all symbols from raster names (BIOMOD2 doesn't like them)
names(env_data_selected) <- gsub("[[:punct:]]", "", names(env_data_selected))

# transform into WGS84
env_data_selected <- project(env_data_selected, "epsg:4326")

# aggregate
env_data_selected <- aggregate(env_data_selected, 4)

# run SDM
sdm_env <- 
  sdm(
    coordinates = occ_coords,
    envlayers = env_data_selected, 
    biasdat = bias_class, 
    models = "RF", 
    BIOMOD_name = "SDM_ENV", 
    tune = FALSE
    )

# Write out raster
sdm_raster <- sdm_env$raster
writeRaster(sdm_raster, here("analysis", "sdm", "outputs", "sdm_env.tif"), overwrite = TRUE)
sdm_raster <- rast(here("analysis", "sdm", "outputs", "sdm_env.tif"))

plot(sdm_raster, col = mako(100), axes = FALSE, box = FALSE)
```

```{r}
source(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "genetic_diversity.R"))
source("general_functions.R")

coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% st_transform(st_crs(sdm_raster))
sdm_env_vals <- terra::extract(sdm_raster, coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]

coords_buffer <- 
  get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% 
  st_buffer(10*1000) %>% 
  st_transform(st_crs(sdm_raster))
sdm_env_vals_buffer <- terra::extract(sdm_raster, coords_buffer, fun = mean, na.rm = TRUE, ID = FALSE)[,1]

mod_df <-
  get_coords() %>%
  left_join(get_het()) %>%
  left_join(get_roh()) %>%
  mutate(sdm_env = sdm_env_vals, sdm_buffer = sdm_env_vals_buffer) 


summary(lm(Ho ~ sdm_env, data = mod_df))
summary(lm(froh0 ~ sdm_env, data = mod_df))


summary(lm(Ho ~ sdm_buffer, data = mod_df))
summary(lm(froh0 ~ sdm_buffer, data = mod_df))

par(mfrow = c(2,2))
plot(mod_df$sdm_env, mod_df$Ho)
plot(mod_df$sdm_env, mod_df$froh0)
plot(mod_df$sdm_buffer, mod_df$Ho)
plot(mod_df$sdm_buffer, mod_df$froh0)

gg_df <- 
  mod_df %>%
  pivot_longer(c("sdm_env", "sdm_buffer"), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  pivot_longer(c("Ho", "froh0"), names_to = "metric", values_to = "metric_value")

ggplot(gg_df, aes(x = value, y = metric_value)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~metric + variable, scales = "free") +
  theme_classic()

ca <- get_ca()
ggplot(gg_df) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = y, col = value)) +
  facet_wrap(~variable) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  theme_void()
```
